title: Pojarkovia stenocephala
taxonomy: Pojarkovia stenocephala is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Pojarkovia, which is a small group of plants native to Central Asia. Pojarkovia stenocephala is a member of the Brassicaceae family, which includes other plants commonly known as mustards or cabbages. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Pojarkovia stenocephala's classification reflects its close relationships with other plants in the Brassicaceae family.
